text:

    Merge llvm-project release/15.x llvmorg-15.0.0-9-g1c73596d3454

    This updates llvm, clang, compiler-rt, libc++, libunwind, lld, lldb and
    openmp to llvmorg-15.0.0-9-g1c73596d3454.

    PR:             265425
    MFC after:      2 weeks
